creator: bugReporter@Haakh.de
text:
OK! I had IPv6 enabled. So I had add "-Djava.net.preferIPv4Stack=true" 
to the command-line. I guess IPv6 is an open issue...

The PR can be closed!

Dr. A. Haakh schrieb:
> Thanks.
>
> Now it works when I run my app from netbeans. If I start it from 
> command-line I get neither exception nor printer-dialog.
> Openjdk6 doesn't show the printer-dialog either!
>
> Jonathan Chen schrieb:
>> This is most likely:
>>     http://bugs.sun.com/bugdatabase/view_bug.do?bug_id=6633656
>>
>> with a workaround described at:
>>     
>> http://www.pikopong.com/blog/2008/09/09/java-printing-fix-for-linux-with-cups/ 
>>
>>
>> Unlikely to be fixed, since we haven't had any update to jdk1.6 for
>> ages. Openjdk6 does not exhibit this problem.
>>   
>
